text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the evening, and Biwa Hayahide and I have
just finished buying some training supplies. We're
on our way home, when...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Hm? It looks like something's going on over
there...

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Step right up and try your luck with our New
Year's raffle! This year's grand prize is a hot
spring vacation for two!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
First-prize winners get a deluxe carrot hamburger
steak! Second-prize winners get a bushel of
carrots! And third-prize winners can take home a
single carrot!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Don't let this opportunity pass you by! Get a
ticket now and spin for your chance to win!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
A raffle, huh? Didn't we get something that
looked like a raffle ticket from the store?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Since we have one, why don't you give it a—
choice_data_list: Get out there and win a big one, Hayahide!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: What?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: You want me to go up there?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
It's not that! I just... hadn't considered going
myself.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I'm usually the one watching things unfold, not
the one participating in the actual event...
choice_data_list: Did you always let Brian take the spotlight?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Well, yes... She was always so sweet when she won
something.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Back when she was still quiet and shy, the only
time she would get excited and yell aloud was
when she won something.
choice_data_list: Well, today, it's your turn to get excited.
Well, today, it's your turn to get excited.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Um... I'd hate to disappoint you, but I don't think
that'll be happening...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Biwa Hayahide gathers her courage, walks up to
the raffle spinner, and gives the handle a crank.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A small plastic ball drops from the tumbler's
opening...

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Holy mackerel! We've got ourselves a grand-prize
winner! Come and get the coupon for your hot
spring vacation! Congratulations!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: ...What?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: I won the grand prize?!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: I-indeed...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: I-I'm fine. I'm just still in shock...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
The odds seem so impossible. There must be 300
balls in the machine, and of those, there can't be
many for the grand prize—

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text: That's right! There's only one ball for the grand prize!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: We beat 300-to-1 odds on our first try?!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: I-I guess...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
But wow, a voucher for a hot spring vacation...
It'd be nice to go once things calm down.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Oh! I'm sorry! This is your prize too, so of course
you're free to invite whoever you'd like. I'm not
sure why I assumed it would be me.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
What was I thinking? I guess I must still be in
shock.
choice_data_list: I don't mind if you want to use it for yourself.
I don't mind if you want to use it for yourself.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: What?! You're all right letting me have it?! Hm...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
All right, how's this? After the Twinkle Series is
over, we can give more thought as to which one
of us should use it and how.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
And if we both happen to be free... Well, we can
cross that bridge when we get to it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And with that, Biwa Hayahide puts away the
voucher very carefully.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Looks like we have another first-prize winner!
Congratulations! You get one deluxe carrot
hamburger steak!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Yay! I won something!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Hehe! I can't believe I actually won—

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Ahem... Yes, well, now I can certainly see how one
might get a little excited about winning first
prize.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
We won this with that ticket we got at the
training supply store, so...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: I think it's only fair if we split it.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Of course! But only if you promise not to tell
anyone about my little outburst here.
choice_data_list: Ah, so it's a bribe of sorts.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: N-no! Just... please don't let anyone know.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
If Brian were to find out I was acting like a little
kid over some raffle... Ugh, the whole thing would
be far too embarrassing...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I promise to take her secret to the grave, and we
enjoy the hamburger steak together.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
We got a second-prize winner! It's your lucky day!
You're going home with a bushel of carrots!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Wow, this is... a lot of carrots. Well, I guess I
won't need to buy any for a while.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Since I have so many, I'd like to give you some as
a small token of my gratitude for all your hard
work!
choice_data_list: And what about Ticket and Taishin over there?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
You read my mind. I was planning to share some
with them too.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Ticket! Taishin! Over here!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Thank youuu!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! Look out, Trainer. Make sure she doesn't
knock you over when she comes flying over he—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Crash!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Oh my gosh! Are you two okay?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And that's how we end up sharing a whole bushel
of carrots with Winning Ticket and Narita Taishin.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Would you lookie here! You've won the third
prize! Here's your carrot!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Yay!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Gasp!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Ahem... Yes, well, winning third prize is quite a
feat.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We decide to split the prize, so we each have half
a carrot.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, tough luck! Looks like you pulled a blank
one! Take this pack of tissues as a consolation
prize.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: What? I only get a pack of tissues?
choice_data_list: It just wasn't your lucky day.
It just wasn't your lucky day.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: I... guess not. But I did learn something.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Brian used to be crushed when she didn't win. I
thought she was adorable whenever she wilted
like that.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
But now I understand how disappointing it
actually feels not to win anything.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I console Biwa Hayahide as we resume our walk
back home...
